title: Possible sql_catalog corruption due to unclean backuped tail
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', NULL), (3, 'Charlie', -5);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NULL OR age < 0;
key_bug_features: unclean backuped tail causing sql_catalog corruption
